chunks.text: \special{!userdict begin /bop-hook{gsave /Helvetica-Bold findfont 200 scalefont setfont 30 650 moveto gsave -55 rotate (DRAFT) true charpath clip 55 rotate /Helvetica-Bold findfont 10 scalefont setfont 35 rotate 0.88 setgray -300
alefont setfont 35 rotate 0.88 setgray -300 20 500 { dup 300 exch moveto 0 1 4 {pop (For Review Only ) show} for 10 add 325 exch moveto 0 1 4 {pop (For Review Only ) show} for } for grestore } def}
